description: Per-position boundary probability from an unsupervised branching-entropy model; units = induced segments (cut where prob > corpus mean).

provenance.reversibility_note: each unit carries inscription_id + stream span (word_index range and/or stream token indices); a sign at unit position p traces to (inscription_id, word_index, sign position).

grading_vs_gorila_words.note: GORILA word boundaries used ONLY to grade the unsupervised model (never an input).
